title: ECONNRESET error when connecting to FTP server
symptom: When attempting to connect to the FTP server, the node returns 'end: read ECONNRESET'. Additionally, testing the credentials results in a permanent testing loop.
not_this_if: Using a version of ssh2-sftp-client below 10.0.3
root_cause: The error occurs due to compatibility issues with the ssh2-sftp-client package versions above 10.0.3 when connecting to certain FTP servers, particularly those running on Windows. This results in connection resets during the handshake process.
fix_steps: Downgrade the ssh2-sftp-client package to version 10.0.3 or below
Restart the n8n instance to apply the changes
agent_instruction: Downgrade the ssh2-sftp-client package to version 10.0.3 or below and restart n8n.
